heading: Monday Night
text: Partly cloudy or becoming so. Patchy valley fog late. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s. Winds becoming light, variable to southwest, except southwest 5 to 10 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Tuesday
text: Mostly sunny after any early fog. Breezy, with highs in the low to mid 80s. Southwest winds gusting to 20 mph, except gusting to 35 mph near the international border.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Fair early; increasing clouds late. Slight chance of a shower far north. Lows from the mid 50s to around 60. West to southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph early.
